title: fix(deps): update module github.com/containers/storage to v1.49.0
body:
[![Mend Renovate](https://app.renovatebot.com/images/banner.svg)](https://renovatebot.com)

This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change |
|---|---|---|---|
| [github.com/containers/storage](https://togithub.com/containers/storage) | require | minor | `v1.48.1-0.20230728131509-c3da76fa3f63` -> `v1.49.0` |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/storage (github.com/containers/storage)</summary>

### [`v1.49.0`](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/releases/tag/v1.49.0)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.48.1...v1.49.0)

#### What's Changed

-   Bump to v1.48.0 by [@​rhatdan](https://togithub.com/rhatdan) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1655](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1655)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/klauspost/compress to v1.16.7 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1659](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1659)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.10.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1661](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1661)
-   composefs integration in the overlay driver by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1646](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1646)
-   pkg/idmap: use unix package for new mount syscalls by [@​Luap99](https://togithub.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1664](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1664)
-   overlay: store if there are no ACLs in the layer by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1663](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1663)
-   pkg/archive: Ignore file mounts when checking for mount points by [@​dfr](https://togithub.com/dfr) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1665](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1665)
-   Implement windows lockfile by [@​mikenorgate](https://togithub.com/mikenorgate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1662](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1662)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.1.8 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1666](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1666)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/microsoft/hcsshim to v0.9.10 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1667](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1667)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runtime-spec to v1.1.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1670](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1670)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbatts/tar-split to v0.11.4 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1669](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1669)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/vbatts/tar-split to v0.11.5 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1671](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1671)
-   build(deps): bump github.com/Microsoft/hcsshim from 0.9.10 to 0.10.0 by [@​dependabot](https://togithub.com/dependabot) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1674](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1674)
-   chunked: support converting existing images by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1673](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1673)
-   fix(deps): update module golang.org/x/sys to v0.11.0 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1678](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1678)
-   Replace drivers/quota.Quota.quotas with a sync.Map by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1676](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1676)
-   chunked: move GetTOCDigest to a subpackage by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1680](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1680)
-   btrfs: remove an unnecessary local variable by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1681](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1681)
-   chunked: drop unused import by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1682](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1682)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230807 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1679](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1679)
-   fix(deps): update module github.com/opencontainers/runc to v1.1.9 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1683](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1683)
-   store: propagate Flags from options by [@​giuseppe](https://togithub.com/giuseppe) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1684](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1684)
-   Extend `local-cross` with `riscv64` arch by [@​michalbiesek](https://togithub.com/michalbiesek) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1686](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1686)
-   overlay: Put should ignore `ENINVAL` for Unmount by [@​flouthoc](https://togithub.com/flouthoc) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1687](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1687)
-   overlay: Diffsize: avoid naive diff by [@​vrothberg](https://togithub.com/vrothberg) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1688](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1688)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230809 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1685](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1685)
-   chore(deps): update dependency containers/automation_images to v20230816 by [@​renovate](https://togithub.com/renovate) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1689](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1689)
-   overlay.Status(): report volatile/shifting support by [@​nalind](https://togithub.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1690](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1690)

#### New Contributors

-   [@​mikenorgate](https://togithub.com/mikenorgate) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1662](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1662)
-   [@​michalbiesek](https://togithub.com/michalbiesek) made their first contribution in [https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/1686](https://togithub.com/containers/storage/pull/1686)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/storage/compare/v1.48.0...v1.49.0

</details>
